speaker: MATT
raw_text: Boom, right across his chin. He falls to the ground, turns around, rubs his chin. "That was a surprising bit of power there for someone your size. Come at me!" He dives at you. Roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I am a big reader and there is a lot I don't know, like my tall friend over here. I mean, there must be trouble that breaks out. There must be bar fights.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Of course, bar fights are fun. That's part of the reason we live here!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I can see the appeal, but what happens if there's something risky or it causes theft of property for someone important?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "If it's a member of the Revelry thieving from another member of the Revelry, and it gets found out, it's brought to Plank King. Plank King makes a judgment, based on that, some sort of reparations or-- (thud, screaming, impacts)"

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: So Plank King is the law?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "More or less."

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: That's biblical.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: But you can still fight other people? For fun?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Why? You looking for a fight?"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you looking for a fight?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Always."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Don't fight each other!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Why?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Because that's crazy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I never throw the first punch, so anytime." He taps the side of one of his jowls. You hear the ruffle of his fingers through his somewhat curled muttonchop on the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Do it!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grabs a drink and without breaking eye contact--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: We just got here.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Why? Why would you do this?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm the worst influence. I'm going to say do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We are trying to get the lay of the land here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Tusktooth?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: (gulping)

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I punch him in the chin!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Roll an attack.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: You didn't even ask him if there's a bookshop nearby.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Might have gotten to that, perhaps.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Unarmed strike! 14? No, 15.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 15 hits. You do one point of damage plus your strength modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Four points of damage!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: They're in season right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I am not telling any of you, especially you, what to do here, but an alternative plan is to get rid of anyone who knows about the location of the tree and bury the tree.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: The tree we just came from or the tree that we're going to?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: If we do that, we might need to ask Tiffany if she knows the location of the tree because it hasn't been brought up as of yet.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck asking Tiffany any questions. We break into Breakfast at Tiffany's and get the information that we need.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That was a long walk.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: It was a long walk, but we're all on the same page. Okay, are we up for a little B&E?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Eyy, this is my specialty.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: In real life or the game?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No comment. I plead the fifth.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Will we be using the fancy doorway?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I think to get in, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, absolutely. Don't you have another way to make a door?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: That's in an emergency.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well yes, but that is--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: That would be permanent.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: That's the thing, she would definitely see there was a new door.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Also, you said there was a balcony right?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Was there a door to the balcony? Do you think that would be locked?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I mean there was a door-- was it solid wood or did it have glass?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: No, it had two glass doorways, like windows, but they open like doors and latch shut.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait, if you could get in to her cabin, you can Disguise Self as well, right? You could change yourself to Vera or something?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Or to Avantika.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Or to Avantika or Vera?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I mean Tiffany?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Oh shit! Shit!

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck! We were doing so well.
